visual.background: Dark teal gradient with small glowing star-like dots.
visual.composition: Centered stacked 3D sign with a large offer in the middle and supporting copy below.
visual.layout: Top wordmark-style PROMO panel; large 500 TL FREE panel; rounded blue copy panel at the bottom.
visual.typography: Large uppercase 3D gold display type with bold white Turkish supporting text.

copy.headline: PROMO 500 TL FREE
copy.subheadline: Kayıt olana özel! Ücretsiz 500 TL hemen hesabında!
copy.language_quality: Turkish copy appears legible; offer wording requires policy review.

marketing.audience: Turkish-speaking users considering registration, inferred from the visible copy.
marketing.value_proposition: A 500 TL free promotion is presented for registration.
claims_requiring_verification: Eligibility and material terms are not shown

test_ideas: Test a clear CTA button against the no-CTA layout
Test an offer disclosure line with legible conditions
change: Reduce reliance on the word FREE if unsupported
keep: High contrast between gold offer and dark background

uncertainties: Offer eligibility and terms cannot be verified from the image
